reviews.author: shekar
reviews.review_body: Enrolling my child in 4th grade at GIIS was a breeze! The admission process was smooth, and the administration was incredibly helpful. I appreciated the transparency throughout. Grateful for the seamless experience.

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Golden Movies
reviews.review_body: Global Indian International School (GIIS) is known for its holistic education with the integration of academics and co-curricular activities. GIIS is dedicated to preparing its students to become citizens of the world, not only through academic achievement but also by molding their characters and using imaginative teaching methods. The institution has different programs starting from kindergarten up to form five that provide education to children from various backgrounds enabling them become competitive across borders. reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Selvi Selvi
reviews.review_body: This school has exceeded my expectations with its impeccable administration and management skills. As a mother, I appreciate how they create a well-thought-out class schedule that maintains a balance between academics and extracurricular activities. The school fees are reasonable, making it affordable for every family.

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Subhash
reviews.review_body: GIIS ‘s academic program and CBSE curriculum have had a remarkable impact on my child's growth. The engaging teaching methods and caring educators provide a nurturing environment. I wholeheartedly recommend GIIS for its holistic approach to education.

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Mamata Sipka Digital
reviews.review_body: GIIS Noida has an incredible team! The staff and faculties are so supportive and passionate about teaching. They make you feel like family from day one. It's amazing to be part of such an inspiring and welcoming community.

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Prerana Priyadarshini
reviews.review_body: The administrative staff at GIIS Noida is excellent. The communication from management has improved significantly, and they are highly professional. They address concerns promptly and keep parents informed of school events. The teachers discuss my child's progress. Overall, great job!

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Shivam Srivastava
reviews.review_body:
Never believe in Tanushree, admission coordinator. She will commit and assure you so many things before the admission but the reality of the school is totally opposite. Disappointed with the Lack of Communication and Professionalism by GIIS.

School forced me to delete my review, instead of resolving it. Also, GIIS is falsely claimed about their any communication to us. It’s been more than 10days neither I received the security amount nor any update from the school. Highly unprofessional.

I enrolled my daughter at GISS with high hopes for her education and overall experience. However, my recent interaction with the school administration has left me thoroughly disappointed.

Despite reaching out via email regarding my daughter's discontinuation due to our family's relocation to the USA, I have received no response for over two weeks. This lack of communication is not only unprofessional but also reflects poorly on the school's integrity.

Furthermore, I raised concerns about the refund of uniform fees, which were not addressed in the initial email nor in subsequent attempts to contact the school.

As a parent, I expect timely and respectful communication from the school, especially when it concerns important matters such as my child's education and finances. The complete disregard for my inquiries has left me questioning the professionalism and integrity of GIIS.

I urge the school administration to improve their communication practices and prioritize the needs of their students and parents. Until then, I cannot recommend GIIS to other families seeking a supportive and responsive educational environment.

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Binni Parida
reviews.review_body: The quality of faculty at GIIS has exceeded our expectations. We are grateful for the dedication and expertise. We are really impressed by the high quality of faculty members at the school, from our interactions with teachers to witnessing their dedication in the classroom….Thanks to GIIS

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Sabyasachi Das
reviews.review_body: The principal at GIIS is really great. Even though he's always busy, he still makes time to meet with us whenever we need to talk to him. We've met with him three times already, and each time he's been really polite and helpful. It's really nice to have a Principal who is very attentive.

reviews.school_name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Noida - Sector 71
reviews.author: Ramya Raja
reviews.review_body: My son studying KG in this school.. his class teacher is very friendly and keeps the kids connected to her.. post the kids updates frequently
